title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
